nodes.name: Helmeted myna
nodes.summary: The helmeted myna (Basilornis galeatus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to Indonesia. Description It is black with white spots on its face with a significant helmet-like crest. Habitat Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, and swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links Image at ADW
nodes.shortSummary: The helmeted myna (Basilornis galeatus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to Indonesia.
